creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
To begin with, does the earth's rotation deviate by 1 second that often? :)

As I wrote in 275415, our source already has 2 of this file.
And the time zone data is updated by freebsd-update and so on.
This seems to imply that the minimum update frequency will be met if the file contained in the time zone data is installed...
